# IP-006: Sanitized in callee — safe (callee sanitizes)
lang: go
file: IP-006-safe.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
    "net/http"
    "os"
    "path/filepath"
)

func caller() {
    x := r.URL.Query().Get("input")
    safe := callee(x)
    os.Open(safe)
}

func callee(s string) string {
    return filepath.Base(s)
}
